comment: Maps (flowR version, platform) to a downloadable self-contained binary archive and its SHA-256 checksum. Populated by the build-binaries GitHub Actions workflow; the download is checksum-verified before the binary is ever executed. An empty `binaries` list simply means no prebuilt binary is available yet, in which case the Node or built-in engine is used.
sigdb_comment: Maps a flowR version to its signature database archive. The database is data, not code, so one archive serves every platform and engine; it is verified like a binary and mounted via $FLOWR_SIGDB_DIR. An empty `sigdb` list means the release naming convention is used instead.
